programs.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick as a nation.

programs.title: Taronga: Who's Who In The Zoo
programs.desc: In one of the biggest vet procedures ever performed at Taronga Zoo nearly 30 staff and specialists are involved in the risky sedation of their 5 1/2 metre tall giraffe Jimiyu.
